_rationale: find_files pattern '*.go' returns no results: the fuzzy fallback now uses real normalized Levenshtein SIMILARITY (1 - dist/maxlen, threshold 0.7), and '*.go' is far from the filenames a/b/c/d on the multi-lang corpus. The prior golden flooded all 4 files at 0.574 because the ported Go fuzzer used the DISTANCE ratio and tested >=0.7 (inverted: unrelated names scored high). Go oracle retired; inverted similarity fixed (handlers_core.cpp). For extension globs use the `filter` arg; `pattern` is filename/path fuzzy+substring matching.
